title: buttery wavy ukrainian cheese pierogi
description: cheese pull, sesame butter, air fry, and a twist on the classic ukrainian pierogi.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add the warm water, stirring with a wooden spoon until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of farmer's cheese in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling, forming a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Repeat with the remaining dough and filling.
Heat the sesame butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the pierogi to the saucepan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the pierogi hot, topped with additional sesame butter if desired.
